positive: A detailed, stylized cosmic forest scene, depicting bioluminescent flora growing around monolithic, crystal-veined ancient trees. The scene should be highly symmetrical and geometrically balanced, featuring a central composition with glowing, ethereal nebulae and swirling galaxies integrated into the foliage. Use a deep indigo, sapphire blue, and vibrant teal color palette with stark pops of warm, glowing gold and cyan for contrast. Style should be a blend of Art Nouveau and stylized digital tattoo flash, ensuring strong, crisp silhouettes, clean outlines, and a high level of detail suitable for textile printing. Minimalist, symmetrical, high contrast, vector illustration style.
negative: blurry, fuzzy, bad anatomy, text, watermark, signature, logo, cropped, artifacts, low resolution, out of frame, messy, noise, sketch, photorealistic
